channel.title: Authors on LFhase
channel.description: Recent content in Authors on LFhase

item.description: I am a senior undergraduate student majoring in Software Engineering. Due to my outstanding academic performance, I was also awarded Top 10 College Student as well as Zuguang Ma Scholarship (<0.01%) by school, National Scholarship by ministry of education and etc. I am looking for one/half-year research intern position and graduate offer currently. If you’re interested, don’t hesitate to contact me. In my graduate years, I’d like to bridge theory and practice by conducting impactful interdisciplinary research, including developing Machine Learning, Reinforcement Learning theories and algorithms, big data management and etc, in order to discover the true power of AI and improve the quality of people’s lives.
